title: Upgrade Non-Trace Hooks, 10-Pack Nail-in Heavy Duty Hangers Transparent Invisible Surround Steel Pins, Multipurpose Hanging Hook for Picture Frame Keys Coat
features: 【Heavy Duty]】The combination of impact-resistant grade main body and stainless steel hook exerts a strong supporting force, and the maximum load-bearing capacity is up to 10kg. Easily hang watches, cleaning tools, backpacks, shelves, whiteboards, vacuum cleaners, etc.

【Long Durability】The hooks are made of high quality crystal plastic PC which will not yellow with age, and invisible enough easily to integrate with the background. It can also help to better locate the position during installation. It has three plating needles to prevent corrosive deterioration. The hook can be rotated and has a certain curvature, compatible with pendants of different sizes and shapes.

【Super Easy to Install】Locate the position and hit the transparent part with a hammer until the three needles are completely submerged into the wall. If you want to remove the hook, just lift the edge and pull it out, it cause minimum damage to the walls, leaves only pin holes which can be easily filled.

【Suitable Surface】It’s perfect to install on plasterboard, Blind plywood, Density Fiberboard, wood, etc. 【Surfaces that cannot be installed]】Gypsum sound absorbing boards, fragile walls such as earthen walls, and hard walls such as concrete.
description: Product Description Brillvang Non-trace Hooks help your life be more tidy and cozy ! With these hooks to help you better tidy up things and save space; Neat but elegant appearance will suitable for anywhere without any inconsistency; Made of high quality materiel for long durability; Hook opening large angle, easy to hang lots of things; Sturdy and secure. Heavy duty up to 10kg. Very little damage to the wall when moving them. Can be used for plasterboard, Blind plywood, Density Fiberboard, wood, etc. These nail-in hooks have widly application, they can easily hang watches, cleaning tools, backpacks, shelves, whiteboards, vacuum cleaners, etc.
